caption: Entity
description: The Entity object is an unordered collection of attributes, with a name and unique identifier. It serves as a base object that defines a set of attributes and default constraints available in all objects that extend it.
name: _entity

uid.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

uid_numeric.description:
The uid attribute in numeric form where applicable.
Note: Producers may populate uid_numeric only in addition to uid and not as an alterative to it.
